CREATE TABLE schema_files (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, uri VARCHAR(255), file_name VARCHAR(255), encoding VARCHAR(10));
INSERT INTO schema_files (uri, file_name, encoding) VALUES ('http://localhost.localdomain/xmlrepository', 'persons.xsd', 'UTF-8');

DECLARE _result VARCHAR; _result := xml_load_schema_decl ('http://localhost.localdomain/xmlrepository', 'persons.xsd', 'UTF-8', 'x-any'); IF (_result = '') THEN _result := 'NO ERRORS DETECTED'; END IF;
CREATE TABLE validation_results (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, schema_file_id INTEGER, validation_message VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY(schema_file_id) REFERENCES schema_files(id));
INSERT INTO validation_results (schema_file_id, validation_message) SELECT id, _result FROM schema_files WHERE file_name = 'persons.xsd';
SELECT _result FROM validation_results WHERE schema_file_id = (SELECT id FROM schema_files WHERE file_name = 'persons.xsd');
INSERT INTO schema_files (uri, file_name, encoding) VALUES ('http://localhost.localdomain/xmlrepository', 'employees.xsd', 'UTF-8');

DECLARE _result_empty VARCHAR; _result_empty := xml_load_schema_decl ('http://localhost.localdomain/xmlrepository', 'empty_schema.xsd', 'UTF-8', 'x-any'); IF (_result_empty = '') THEN _result_empty := 'NO ERRORS DETECTED'; END IF;
SELECT _result AS validation_result FROM DUAL WHERE _result IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE error_logs (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, log_message VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO error_logs (log_message) SELECT _result FROM validation_results WHERE schema_file_id = (SELECT id FROM schema_files WHERE file_name = 'persons.xsd') AND validation_message IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE schema_files SET encoding = 'ISO-8859-1' WHERE file_name = 'persons.xsd';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM validation_results WHERE validation_message LIKE '%ERROR%';
